sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ نُورُ شَيْئًا غَرِيبًا فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nour je pronašla nešto čudno u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: Nour found something strange in the garden.

sentences.translation: Stvar je bila mala i sjajna.
sentences.translationEn: The thing was small and shiny.

sentences.translation: Nour ga je odnijela svojoj majci da ga pogleda.
sentences.translationEn: Nour took it to her mother to look at it.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَتِ الْأُمُّ إِلَيْهِ وَقَالَتْ: لَا أَعْرِفُ مَا هُوَ.
sentences.translation: Majka ga je pogledala i rekla: Ne znam šta je to.
sentences.translationEn: The mother looked at it and said: I don't know what it is.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتَا مَعًا وَفَكَّرَتَا كَثِيرًا فِي الْأَمْرِ.
sentences.translation: Sjedile su zajedno i dugo razmišljale o tome.
sentences.translationEn: They sat together and thought about it for a long time.
